webp_migration_note: WebP previews use .webp extensions under _optimized-report/webp-preview/. Trip data and components reference .jpeg/.jpg paths — switching to WebP requires updating data/ trip heroImage/gallery paths OR a build step that maps paths. Path-compatible JPEG/PNG outputs in public/images-optimized/ can replace originals without code changes.
